steps.title: Step 1
steps.content: Define variables: $x$ = number of 1-point questions, $y$ = number of 2-point questions. Each 1-point question contributes $1 \cdot x$ points; each 2-point question contributes $2 \cdot y$ points.

steps.title: Step 2
steps.content: The total points from both question types must equal $84$: $x + 2y = 84$.

steps.title: Step 3
steps.content: Check the other choices: $xy = 84$ is a product, not a sum of contributions. $3(x+y) = 84$ implies each question is worth 3 points on average. $x + y = 84$ counts the number of questions, not the point values.

steps.title: Step 4
steps.content: Only $x + 2y = 84$ correctly weights each question type by its point value and sums to the total. That matches Choice D — $x + 2y = 84$.
